description: Write programmatic Node.js or TypeScript scripts that drive the DatoCMS Content Management API using @datocms/cma-client, @datocms/cma-client-node, or @datocms/cma-client-browser — the code-first companion for content-heavy and automation work. Prefer this skill whenever the task needs real code for records, uploads, or project automation — including short mid-conversation asks like "publish them", "fix those slugs", "delete all drafts", or "bulk import this CSV", and longer checked-in scripts. Covers four areas: (1) content operations — create/update/delete/publish records, bulk import/export and CSV pipelines, pagination over large record sets, asset uploads from URL or local files with metadata, structured text and block payload edits; (2) environment and project governance — fork/promote environments, webhooks and build triggers, project settings and maintenance mode, scheduled publish/unpublish workflows, audit logs, usage analytics, subscription limits; (3) access control and typed flows — roles and API tokens, upload tracks and tags, generated CMA schema types for type-safe record operations; (4) schema and UI configuration when the user explicitly bypasses the migrations workflow or wants schema mutations embedded in a larger script — models, fields, blocks, saved filters, dashboard and schema menus, plugin install and configuration. For ordinary schema changes inside a project with a migrations workflow or a secondary environment, prefer `datocms-cli` migrations as the safe default; reach for this skill only when the user opts out or the mutation is part of a broader automation. Works for both one-off execution via `cma:call` / `cma:script` and checked-in `buildClient()` scripts for reusable or unattended code.

results.query: I need to create a new blog post in DatoCMS programmatically using the CMA client. The model has title (string), slug (slug), body (structured text), and published_date (date) fields. Can you write the script?
we're migrating 500 products from a CSV file into DatoCMS. each product has a name, price, description, and an image URL that needs to be uploaded as a DatoCMS asset. can you build the import script?
How do I update a record's structured text field via the CMA? I need to programmatically set the body of an article to include headings, paragraphs, and an inline block record reference.

I need to create a new model called 'Team Member' in DatoCMS using the CMA client. It should have fields: name (string), role (string), bio (structured text), photo (file), and a link to a 'Department' model.
can you help me paginate through all the records in my 'article' model? there are about 2000 of them and i need to export them to a JSON file. using @datocms/cma-client-node

I need to upload images to DatoCMS from URLs, set their alt text and title metadata, and then assign them to records. Some images are already in the media library so I should check for duplicates first.
How do I fork a DatoCMS environment, make some schema changes (add a new field to the blog_post model), and then promote it to primary? Using the CMA client programmatically.
I want to set up a webhook in DatoCMS that triggers when any record is published. Can you show me how to create the webhook configuration using the CMA client?
need to bulk update the SEO fields on about 300 product records in datocms. want to set the meta description to a template based on the product name and category. using the cma client
I need to query all blog posts from DatoCMS and display them on my React site. They have a title, cover image, and body. Can you write the GraphQL query for the Content Delivery API?
Can you help me render the responsive image component from react-datocms? I want blur-up placeholders and srcset for my DatoCMS images.
I want to build a custom sidebar plugin for DatoCMS that shows word count and reading time. How do I use the plugin SDK's renderItemFormSidebar hook?
can you help me write a migration script using the datocms CLI? I need to create a new model with datocms migrations:new and then run it on my sandbox env
How do I set up draft mode for my Next.js App Router site with DatoCMS? I need the enable/disable route handlers and the token-switching executeQuery wrapper.
I need to set up DatoCMS Content Link so editors can click on content in the preview and jump to the right record in the CMS. How do I add the stega encoding?
Help me set up the DatoCMS Web Previews plugin integration. I need a preview-links endpoint in my Nuxt app that returns the correct URL for each record type.
I'm building a Prisma schema for my PostgreSQL database. I need models for User, Post, and Comment with proper relations. Can you help?
How do I configure cache tag invalidation in my SvelteKit site so that when DatoCMS content changes, only the relevant pages get purged from Cloudflare's cache?
Use datocms-cma to create a blog post record with a structured text body and publish it in DatoCMS.
Use datocms-cma to upload remote images, set alt and title metadata, and link the uploads to product records.
Use datocms-cma to scaffold a datocms CLI migration and run it against my staging profile.
publish them all in DatoCMS for me
unpublish the draft articles on DatoCMS, just do it
bulk-update the titles of those DatoCMS records
just delete those test records from DatoCMS
the DatoCMS records I showed you earlier — can you publish them yourself?
fix the slugs on those DatoCMS items
do the DatoCMS token setup thing for me before publishing — I don't want to paste an API token into .env, use my OAuth login
I need to add a seo field to the article model on DatoCMS
rename the 'body' field on blog_post to 'content' in our DatoCMS project
add a required meta_description to every DatoCMS model that has a title field
I just want to add a new optional text field to the author model on DatoCMS, quickly, without setting up a migrations workflow — what's the right way?
just tell me which fields the DatoCMS blog_post model has and whether slug is required — I don't need code, I just want to know the schema
